Help Content:
The extension reads the current YouTube video title, strips out brackets, special symbols, and characters such as Japanese and Korean, extracts the remaining keywords, and uses them to search for danmaku on Bilibili.

What the dictionary does: before extracting keywords, it replaces each "Word in title" with the "Replace with" text you specify. The replacement is not limited to any language — it can be Chinese, English, numbers, or any text.

For example, if a title contains an artist's Korean name or an abbreviation that matches poorly, you can replace it with the full or more common name used on Bilibili to find more accurate danmaku.

Enter the word that appears in the title on the left, and the word to replace it with on the right. Save to apply.
